calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Contributor Onboarding — Pipeline Smoke Test (Daniel-PC)
items.notes: Pipeline round-trip verification for newly onboarded Daniel-PC. Records GPU name, CUDA status, steps/sec. Not a scientific experiment.
